name: Hover Feather
preceding_figure_names: Hover Telemark, Natural Turn, Reverse Wave
following_figure_names: Three Step, Reverse Turn, Change Of Direction, Closed Telemark, Open Telemark and Feather Ending, Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave, Top Spin, Outside Swivel, Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Bounce Fallaway with Weave Ending
notes:
Note -- Body will overturn slightly to R on preceding Heel Pull. the footwork of the Heel Pull will be: 1. TH; 2 H; IE of foot, whole foot, then T of RF and pressure on IE of T of LF.
Note -- Body will overturn to R on preceding Brush step. The Lady will rise from the ball of LF at the end of the Brush step. The L heel does not touch the floor.
The Hover Feather is a Silver Level figure. This online reference gives a detailed description of the dance steps, including timing, footwork, alignment, and movement; steps diagram; a list of figures that may precede or follow the pattern; and videos providing instruction and demonstration of the figure, techniques and practice routines that include it.

steps.action: LF diagonal forward preparing to step opposite partner, L side leading
comments: Rise e/o preceding Heel Pull. Up Compress right side, change angle through diagonal, allow head to prepare to go outside partner.

steps.action: RF diagonal back, R side leading
comments: Rise e/o Brush step. Up Feel the left hip is dancing across inside edge of left foot. Keep head very left, feel like dancing rib cage across the feet. Hold diagonal extra shaping for the 2 steps. Push off standing leg to move. Do not take upper body back too fast. Take everything through lower center. Lower center move faster than upper center. Keep counter balance in the Man's arms, leave arms to Man, as you swing rightwards. Pull center back.
